security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data may be altered during transmission.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

assumptions: The system does not use end-to-end encryption for votes.
The actor can intercept and modify vote data during transmission.

mitigation.strategy: Implement secure data transmission using TLS or similar protocols.

description: An attacker might alter the vote data during its transmission to the contract.

security_gap.gap_description: The system lacks mechanisms to prevent users from denying their votes.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Vote logging and auditing may be inadequate.

assumptions: The system does not provide non-repudiation for votes.
The actor has enough plausible deniability to avoid detection after casting a vote.

mitigation.strategy: Implement robust logging and auditing mechanisms for all votes.

description: An attacker may cast a vote and subsequently deny having done so.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data may be exposed during transmission or storage.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Vote data confidentiality is not enforced.

assumptions: The system does not protect vote data during transmission or storage.
The actor is capable of monitoring network traffic or compromising the database.

mitigation.strategy: Secure vote data with appropriate encryption during transmission and storage.

description: Vote data confidentiality may be compromised if it is exposed during transmission or storage.
